keyFeatures.zh: 基于AI的音乐生成和创作
可定制的音乐风格和流派

description.en: Basic features with limited monthly credits
description.zh: 基本功能，包含有限的每月积分

description.en: Advanced features with more monthly credits
description.zh: 高级功能，包含更多的每月积分

weaknesses.en: Limited file size and credits for free tier
weaknesses.zh: 免费版文件大小和积分有限制

weaknesses.en: No specific mention of customer support

targetAudience.en: Independent artists, music producers, and hobbyists
targetAudience.zh: 独立艺术家、音乐制作人和爱好者

positioning.en: Musely positions itself as a tool for creating high-quality music with AI, catering to both beginners and professionals.
positioning.zh: Musely 将自己定位为一个使用 AI 创作高质量音乐的工具，面向初学者和专业人士
